summary: The Docker-based reproduction clones flatted at commit `2a02dce7c641dec31194c67663f9b0b12e62da20`, runs the Go `-d` unflatten path with a crafted out-of-range reference, and confirms that the parser panics instead of returning a normal error.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should cause the Go parser to dereference an out-of-range flatted reference and terminate with `panic: runtime error: index out of range [999] with length 1` from `golang/pkg/flatted/flatted.go:239`.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned the repository, checked out commit `2a02dce7c641dec31194c67663f9b0b12e62da20`, built the Docker image, and produced `panic: runtime error: index out of range [999] with length 1` with a stack trace through `/target-repo/golang/pkg/flatted/flatted.go:239`, followed by `[evohunt] verification confirmed the out-of-range panic`.
verification_method: The containerized verifier runs `go run . -d /app/payload.json` against the mounted checkout, requires the command to fail, and matches the panic string, the `flatted.loop` frame, and the exact `flatted.go:239` location to distinguish the vulnerability from an unrelated build or runtime failure.
evidence_produced_by_run: The run emitted `panic: runtime error: index out of range [999] with length 1`.
The verifier printed `[evohunt] verification confirmed the out-of-range panic` and the wrapper script printed `[evohunt] SUCCESS: reproduction completed and verified`.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
